title: Tao Te Ching 70
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 70 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 70 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: My words are very easy to understand and very easy to practice. Yet the world cannot understand them or practice them.
